title: rubus × mariae
intro: Rubus × mariae, also known as the hybrid thimbleberry or thimbleberry hybrid, is a rare and unique plant resulting from the cross between Rubus parviflorus (the thimbleberry) and Rubus idaeus (the raspberry). The medicinal properties of Rubus × mariae include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × mariae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Rubus × mariae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
